null_expectations.note: Expected exceedance fractions if the climate matched the 1991-2020 baseline. Counts above these are the anomaly signal; counts near them are the base rate.

validation.note: Searched; no date-specific report for a warm 1 Aug 2023 in Guwahati.
A cool monsoon day; searched, no public coverage found.
Searched; the well-documented 3–5 Oct 2023 disaster was the Sikkim GLOF / North Bengal floods ~500km away, which does not match Guwahati — so no corroboration claimed.
